programme.desc: A 76-year-old man sustains a head injury after falling down some stairs, and his daughter reflects on how his caring for her mother through her dementia has left him exhausted. A five-year-old girl is brought into the paediatric department with a large splinter lodged in her bottom, and a patient has a lump on her shoulder that has developed since having a fall five weeks ago

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: On the frontline with the South Yorkshire police as they deal with an increasing numbers of non-emergency cases. A man reports an assault in progress, but when police arrive they find him in a drunk and drugged state and hoping for a lift home. What surprises them most, however, is when he asks them to go pick up his cannabis stash first. In Sheffield city centre, officers help a confused elderly woman suffering from dementia who cannot find her way home

programme.desc: At Nikolas Patrick in London, Charlie and Patrick consider buying a statue of Napoleon and it's heads versus hearts for a deal on a thoroughbred racehorse. programme.title: Posh Pawnbrokers
programme.desc: Charlie and Patrick try to do deals on a pair of Michael Jackson autographs and a limited edition turntable, while two luxury pens and a gold pocket watch could help save a dog home from closure. programme.title: Posh Pawnbrokers
programme.desc: At Pickwick Pawnbrokers in south-east London, Nathan and Debs consider a stamp collection that may contain a hidden gem, while in Sheffield, Dan is stumped over a rare watch and tries to put together a deal on a £250,000 Ferrari in just 24 hours

programme.title: Posh Pawnbrokers

programme.desc: Part one of two. Veteran actors and married couple Prunella Scales and Timothy West pass the tiller to Sheila Hancock and Gyles Brandreth, who are celebrating 40 years of friendship by making new memories together and learning new skills. Sheila and Gyles learn the ropes with Tim, and set out by themselves along the upper reaches of the River Thames. It's the same river that roars past their homes in London, but just 50 miles upstream it's an Arcadian paradise of unspoiled nature, royal retreats and river regattas

He then meets opera singer Russell Watson, whose saluki Poppy has a fear of other dogs, before helping former England striker Michael Owen, whose Staffordshire bull terrier Ronnie has attacked dogs in the past

programme.title: Cocoon (1985)
programme.desc: The elderly residents of a retirement home treat themselves to an occasional dip in the pool at an abandoned house. Ron Howard's sci-fi drama, with Wilford Brimley, Jessica Tandy, Hume Cronyn, Don Ameche and Steve Guttenberg

Sci-fi sequel, with Wilford Brimley, Don Ameche, Steve Guttenberg and Jessica Tandy

programme.title: Make You Laugh Out Loud
programme.desc: Compilation of internet videos, including cats playing musical instruments, dressed in costumes and riding on vacuum cleaners, as well as introducing felines so famous they have their own Hollywood agents. The programme also features the owners who dream up the ideas for these online films, and bloggers who have made a fortune cashing in on their popularity, while behaviour experts are on hand to analyse and explain the physiological characteristics of the pets. Narrated by Iain Lee, with commentary by Susan Calman

programme.title: Rich House, Poor House Changed My Life
programme.desc: Revisiting a selection of swaps to see what impact the programme has had on the people featured, beginning with two families who appeared a year ago. The Gowlands were counting every penny, while millionaire property developers the Greens lived in luxury and for one week they traded home and budgets

programme.title: World's Most Luxurious
programme.desc: Only the world's richest can possibly afford a super yacht, but it is not the price tag that makes these extravagant vessels exceptional, it is the luxurious details. Here, members of the billionaire Haidar family display their 52-metre floating palace, where a 13-strong staff attends to their every need. Plus, cameras sneak a peek behind the scenes as a charter yacht is prepared for a group of wealthy Americans and follow Becki Milton, private yacht shopper to the super-rich, as she finds the ultimate getaway for three secretive celebs

programme.title: Fred and Rose West: The Search for the Victims
programme.desc: Part one of two. Documentary examining the crimes of the couple, revealing the true horror of what took place behind closed doors at 25 Cromwell Street and other addresses in Gloucester over the course of many years. The programme looks at recent police efforts to find the body of Mary Bastholm and tells her story, as well those of the 12 other young women known to have been murdered by Fred and Rose West

Far from being a committed husband and pillar of the Hindu community, he had been plotting an affair with his lover in Australia

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: While performing an autopsy for a class of military students, Ducky discovers the cadaver he is using is the body of a murder victim. In trying to identify the corpse, Gibbs and his team are set on the trail of a career criminal specialising in identity fraud. Meanwhile, Ziva has difficulty separating her personal feelings and professional judgment. Starring David McCallum and Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A Navy Seal is shot dead while threatening to throw himself from the top of a building. An al-Qaeda operative emerges as the main suspect, but DiNozzo thinks the killer may actually be found closer to home. Elsewhere, a rumour spreads that Abby may be about to leave NCIS for good. Michael Weatherly and Pauley Perrette star in the American drama

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Police action to close down an illegal dog-fighting ring leads to a murder inquiry when officers find a woman's finger inside one of the creatures. As the case deepens, Detectives Green and Lupo must contend with the involvement of a pushy journalist. Crime drama, guest starring Lara Flynn Boyle (The Practice)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Green investigate when an adulterous art dealer is stoned to death. The detectives learn that the victim's plan to display provocative art led to unwanted attention from a terrorist organisation and gives them cause to suspect her son - a fanatical Christian - was persuaded by a religious leader to kill his mother. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Brimstone and Curtis investigate the disappearance of a wealthy couple seemingly snatched from their apartment building, but suspicion eventually falls on a man suffering from mental illness - presenting Ross with a tough ethical decision. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach, Benjamin Bratt and Carey Lowell

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate when a man is crushed to death under a crane. Initially they suspect the construction company of foul play, but the case leads them to the victim's hospitalised wife, as well as plans for a controversial medical procedure

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate the murder of a man visiting New York City to confront his past, but as they delve into the victim's personal life, the case becomes complicated when all clues point to a revered sheriff. Meanwhile, McCoy faces competition when a new district attorney is nominated for election

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy and Carmichael have the unenviable task of prosecuting three police officers with a racially motivated hate crime that threatens to cause uproar in the city. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Angie Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A childhood friend of Gibbs' dead daughter is stalked by a marine who recently returned from Iraq, and asks the agent for help. Memories of his murdered family lead him to make the case a priority, but he acts on his initiative and leaves HQ without his badge, making DiNozzo fear he is risking his job for a personal vendetta. Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A taxi driver and an admiral working at the Pentagon are found executed by the side of a road, but the agents have trouble ascertaining a motive - until they uncover links to a woman searching for her missing husband, a political refugee from Africa. Meanwhile, McGee makes a discovery about his new girlfriend. Starring Sean Murray, Michael Weatherly and Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Abby babysits a bright nine-year-old while the other members of the team try to locate the youngster's missing father - a survivalist wanted in connection with a case of robbery and murder. The search takes them deep into the wilderness - where a startling discovery awaits. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Sean Murray

programme.title: Columbo: Negative Reaction (1974)
programme.desc: A successful photographer wants to get rid of his nagging wife so he can pursue an affair with his assistant. He murders his spouse and makes it look as if she was killed by a kidnapper, and at the same time puts an ex-con in the frame. However, the dogged detective sees through his ruse and proceeds to pick the story to pieces. Crime drama, with Peter Falk, Dick Van Dyke, Don Gordon and Antoinette Bower

programme.title: Columbo: Now You See Him (1976)
programme.desc: A stage magician has kept the fact that he is a Nazi war criminal a secret for years. When a nightclub manager threatens to expose him, the illusionist kills him and arranges the perfect alibi - because at the time of the murder, he was apparently performing an escapology act. However, Columbo sets out to uncover the truth. Detective drama, with Peter Falk and Jack Cassidy

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson hopes justice will be served as child abductor Lewis Hodda goes on trial. However, when a plea deal is rejected, Barba must rely on decades-old evidence to make his case, and faces off against former SVU colleague Dr Huang. Crime drama, guest starring Tom Sizemore

programme.title: Gone
programme.desc: Fifteen years after her abduction as a child, Kick Lannigan teams up with the FBI agent who rescued her to search for a missing girl. Pilot episode of the crime drama, starring Chris Noth and Leven Rambin

Drama, starring Angela Lansbury, Tom Bosley and Howard Duff

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica travels to San Francisco for her niece's wedding, but finds herself trying to prove the groom innocent of murder when he is accused of killing his boss, who had been refusing to pay him. Drama, starring Angela Lansbury, Jeff Conaway and Martin Landau

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica investigates the backstage murder of a dancer while attending a special presentation of the Rostov Ballet. Angela Lansbury stars as the amateur sleuth, with Tom Bosley

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica investigates the demise of a flamboyant hypnotist, who died behind locked doors in front of an audience of mesmerised journalists. Mystery drama, guest starring Jose Ferrer

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica takes over a congressman's seat in Washington while trying to find out who was responsible for his murder - but political shenanigans and sinister goings-on conspire to keep her from solving the crime. Mystery, starring Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A Broadway actress comes out of retirement to star with her daughter in a musical produced by her son - but soon finds her life in danger. Luckily, Jessica has been invited along to see the show by nephew Grady and decides to investigate. Guest starring Vivian Blaine and Lorna Luft, with Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica goes to New Orleans to appear on a chat show, but is sidetracked into solving the death of a famous jazz musician murdered while performing on stage. Angela Lansbury stars

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica's peaceful cruise with her niece is disrupted by a series of terrifying threats, prompting her to try to uncover the truth before the culprit starts sending people to a watery grave. Crime drama, guest starring Leslie Nielsen, with Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica visits a beautiful Mediterranean island to celebrate the birthday of a famous artist - but soon finds herself hunting for his killer. Guest starring Ron Moody and Stewart Granger

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica pulls out all the stops to help private eye Harry McGraw find his partner's murderer. Angela Lansbury and Jerry Orbach star

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica inherits shares in an American football team. When the owner of the squad is found dead she investigates a possible connection to a series of offers she has received to buy her out. Angela Lansbury stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson puts herself in danger when a home invasion escalates into a hostage situation

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A high-school rape accusation escalates into a complicated 'he-said-she-said' debacle, and with no conclusive or satisfactory resolution on the horizon, it becomes unclear what - if anything - has taken place. Meanwhile, getting embroiled in an ugly legal battle threatens the futures of two promising students. Legal drama, starring Mariska Hartigay

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Detective Eames is forced to re-examine the circumstances behind her officer husband's murder when his former partner is killed on the job, and revisits a life that she thought long buried. Crime drama, starring Kathryn Erbe and Vincent D'Onofrio

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Detectives Logan and Falacci investigate the murder of an obstetrician found posed in a ritualistic fashion, spread-eagled on an examination chair, and the clues lead them to the doctor's son. Crime drama, starring Chris Noth and Alicia Witt

programme.title: Gone
programme.desc: The team investigates a kidnapping, only to find the victim's entire family has gone missing. Drama, starring Leven Rambin

programme.title: Gone
programme.desc: A pregnant woman is kidnapped in broad daylight in front of her husband. The team soon has a suspect, but finds that no one involved in the case is who they seem to be

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. Met helicopter India 99 has cameras so powerful that crimes can be spotted from a thousand feet up. Dave and Nick are two 'super recognisers' of the police service who are on the lookout for known drug dealers

programme.title: Columbo: Playback (1975)
programme.desc: An inventor tries to stop his mother-in-law from exposing his infidelities by murdering her in front of a security camera - and tampering with the recording to make it look like the killing occurred at a time when he had an alibi. However, Columbo sees through his hi-tech ruse and tries to expose the truth. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Oskar Werner and Gena Rowlands

programme.title: Columbo: Make Me a Perfect Murder (1978)
programme.desc: A TV executive's assistant responds to being denied a promotion by killing her boss, then uses her years of experience working on detective shows to create the perfect cover-up. But she reckons without the intervention of Columbo, who begins laying his trap for her while also nursing a neck injury. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk and Trish Van Devere

programme.title: Columbo: The Greenhouse Jungle (1972)
programme.desc: A penniless rare-plant collector, desperate for funds to support his expensive hobby, fakes his nephew's kidnapping to get his hands on a trust fund. However, the supposed victim turns up dead, prompting Columbo to take action to unmask the killer. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Bradford Dillman and Ray Milland

programme.title: Columbo: The Most Crucial Game (1972)
programme.desc: The owner of an American football team is found dead in a swimming pool, and his drowning is regarded as an accident. The down-at-heel detective is convinced that foul play was involved and sets out to prove his case - but his chief suspect has a cast-iron alibi that places him miles away from the scene of the crime. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk and Robert Culp

programme.title: Columbo: Double Shock (1973)
programme.desc: A wealthy man due to marry a younger woman is electrocuted in the bath. Columbo suspects the victim's identical twin nephews - a flamboyant TV chef and a conservative banker - who stand to inherit his fortune if he died unmarried, but the detective is unsure which of them is the guilty party. Drama, starring Peter Falk, and Martin Landau in a dual role. With Paul Stewart, Julie Newmar and Jeanette Nolan

programme.title: Columbo: The Conspirators (1978)
programme.desc: A terrorist posing as an Irish author heads a peace organization while secretly running guns for the IRA in Belfast. When he kills an arms dealer who tried to swindle him, the writer is sure he has covered his tracks - until Columbo shambles on to the scene. Detective drama, with Peter Falk, Clive Revill, Jeanette Nolan and Bernard Behrens

programme.title: Columbo: Grand Deceptions (1989)
programme.desc: An army colonel who embezzled money from his superior officer to fund arms sales becomes the target of a blackmail attempt when his crimes are discovered. The crooked officer kills the extortionist and makes it look like an accident, but the crumpled cop is soon on his case. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Robert Foxworth and Janet Elber

programme.title: Columbo: A Friend in Deed (1974)
programme.desc: A Californian police commissioner helps a rich, influential friend to conceal his complicity in murdering his own wife - but reckons without detective Columbo's timely intervention and his dogged determination to bring the truth to light. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Richard Kiley and Rosemary Murphy

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team investigates when Libby Parker is followed home by a gang of teenagers, and raped in the courtyard of her apartment block. Hundreds of windows overlooked the scene of the crime, but not one of the residents who witnessed the attack called the police. The prosecutors face an even more difficult dilemma when it emerges none of Libby's neighbours are willing to make a statement either. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hartigay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Notorious serial killer Gregory Williams Yeats concocts an elaborate plan to free himself from incarceration by co-operating with one-time nemesis Dr Carl Rudnick. When the pair ultimately break out of prison, Chicago detectives Lindsay and Dawson head to New York on the trail of fugitives, and the SVU team is enlisted to help bring the pair back to justice. The first of a two-part cross-over episode with Chicago PD, guest starring Sophia Bush and Jon Seda

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: The murder of a dentist leads Goren and Eames to a company at the heart of a criminal conspiracy involving contaminated mouthwash that has caused the deaths of several children. Establishing a motive for the killing proves difficult - and the detectives begin to suspect they are being manipulated by someone close to the investigation. Drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: Gone
programme.desc: A boy is kidnapped from his home, and the team discovers this could be the latest in a series of child abductions in the area

programme.title: Gone

programme.desc: Developers Lucy Alexander and Martin Roberts visit a lower-ground-floor flat in London, a detached house in Kent and an end-of-terrace home in Stoke before finding out how much each property sold for at auction

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Lucy Alexander and Martin Roberts explore a one-bedroom house in Canterbury, a semi-detached home in Chaddesden, Derby, and a pub in Rotherham, South Yorkshire, and then follow the sales at auction and talk to the buyers about their plans for the buildings

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles is in Spalding, Lincolnshire, to meet Dakota Read and her family. The eight-year-old was born with quadriplegic cerebral palsy and her home needs to be made more wheelchair-friendly. Enter the DIY SOS builders, who set to work on designer Gabrielle Blackman's vision, although with just nine days to complete the task, they'll need help. Luckily, the local tradespeople are also out in force, giving their time and their skills for free

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and Margie Cooper begin the second leg of their road trip, and head for an auction in Exeter, with Margie hoping to catch up with her profit level after a disheartening first day

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.desc: The police helicopter is called out to assist Charlie and Mish, who are in hot pursuit of two shoplifters careering through Slough, and the police chase a drink-driver in Devon

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: A baby marmoset is looking for a new mum and dad, bachelor chimpanzee Paco is in the wars with an injured toe and a heart scare, and the nursery orang-utans box clever at play time

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Woolly monkey Piquita may be expecting a new arrival, while Marmosets Hazel and Solomon meet a new arrival themselves. The park receives five unusual nocturnal guests

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Alison receives a special delivery in the form of five loris, which have travelled to the UK all the way from Hong Kong. Plus, orang-tuan Gordon shows off his skills

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Orang-utan Lucky moves home, while young woolly monkey Lucas causes concern. Plus, little chimp Thelma is up to her usual tricks

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: There's a woolly bundle of joy for Pacaja, and the slow loris demonstrate just how they got their name when the team try to weigh them

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Jeremy heads to Belgium to collect two new stumpies. The team get ready to say farewell to two much-loved gibbons, and young chimp Thelma gets the brush off

programme.title: Neighbourhood Blues
programme.desc: Immigration Enforcement investigates restaurants suspected of using illegal workers in Bath, while officers in Weston-super-Mare search for those involved in a spate of stabbings

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: Presenter Dominic Littlewood joins officers as they search for the man responsible for a crime wave in Preston, and vandals are given the task of clearing up the damage they have caused

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: Revealing the terrifying moment a victim came face to face with a burglar. Plus, the case of a churchgoer who was caught making his own collection. Presented by Dominic Littlewood

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: A light-fingered neighbour is caught stealing from a vulnerable pensioner. Some tricks of the trade are also revealed for keeping belongings at arm's length from bag-snatchers. Presented by Dominic Littlewood

programme.title: Stop, Search, Seize
programme.desc: Documentary following the work of Ireland's border force officers as they fight to stop gangs of organised smugglers from bringing drugs, money, guns, cars and even exotic animals into the country

programme.title: The Force: Manchester
programme.desc: Documentary following the work of Greater Manchester Police, which is England's second-largest force and is responsible for protecting 2.7 million people

programme.title: Britain's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: The case of Billy Dunlop, who killed 22-year-old Julie Hogg, and went on to become the first person to be convicted under revised UK double-jeopardy laws

programme.title: How I Caught the Killer
programme.desc: Detectives look back on the case of Elijah Butler, murdered four days after he married his wife - by her long-term stalker

programme.title: Fred Dinenage: Murder Casebook
programme.desc: The case of Harold Jones, found guilty of murder at the age of 15 in 1921, who is also suspected to have been 1960s serial killer 'Jack the Stripper'

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: The disturbing case of 53-year-old German Horst Kroener, who was jailed in 2016 for murdering his Filipina wife in her sleep

programme.title: Night Cops
programme.desc: Officers deal with a violent person and a reckless driver. Documentary exploring the work Britain's police forces carry out during the night

programme.title: Police Force: Australia
programme.desc: Detectives investigate an aggravated robbery and abduction. Meanwhile, a police drug dog is used to catch out drivers on a rural road

programme.title: Police Force: Australia
programme.desc: Officers hunt for a drug kingpin and his runners, while drunk men threaten a member of the public while brandishing a weapon

programme.title: Police Force: Australia
programme.desc: Officers carry out raids in a small community as they hunt local drug dealers, while another team heads out to an accident hot spot to catch drivers using their phones

programme.title: Police Force: Australia

programme.title: The Dales

Tom Orde-Powlett puts on his first public falconry display at Bolton Castle

programme.title: The Dales
programme.desc: Vicar Ann Chapman hosts an end-of-season sermon by Lake Semerwater in Wensleydale, and the milk wagon visits Carol and Phillip Mellin's farm for the final time. Amanda and Clive Owen visit the Muker Show with their five children, hoping to see out the summer in style. Adrian Edmondson presents

programme.title: The Lady with the Lamp (1951)
programme.desc: Biopic of Florence Nightingale, who went down in medical history for her heroic efforts to treat thousands of casualties during the Crimean War, while the British Government belittled her for being a woman. Starring Anna Neagle and Michael Wilding

programme.title: Saturday Night Revue (1937)
programme.desc: A singer performs regularly in a small Soho club with her piano player boyfriend. She discovers that her father, who works for a recording company, will be coming to see them perform - but he has got the address of a far more exclusive establishment. The couple pull out all the stops to get themselves on the bill. Musical, starring Billy Milton and Sally Gray

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours narrated by Dewyne Lindsay, this time exploring Camden and Sydenham for locals and tourists.

programme.title: The Food Inspectors
programme.desc: Matt Allwright visits a farm where cows are being checked for tuberculosis, a disease that can be carried in milk and steak. The owner of a Wolverhampton roadside cafe is highly critical of the food inspectors, but they find cause for concern at the establishment. Chris Hollins and food inspector Ben Milligan make a surprise visit to a party in Buckinghamshire, where the food preparation is examined

programme.title: London Live News
programme.desc: News headlines, travel, weather and debate from across the capital

programme.title: Goodnight Sweetheart
programme.desc: Gary returns to 1940 following an ultimatum from Yvonne, and Ron forges wartime money so his friend can make a killing on the stock exchange. Starring Nicholas Lyndhurst and Dervla Kirwan

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Abbey Wood, Ladywell. Short visual tours exploring and revealing lesser known areas of London for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay.

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Peter Maneas embarks on a journey through some of the most spectacular and unique Greek islands, exploring the rich culture, history and food of Greece while meeting the locals and those who live there

programme.title: The Old Guys
programme.desc: Amber takes a shine to the local vicar and persuades her father to accompany her to a church group meeting. However, Tom's new-found interest in Christianity, as well as his friendship with Roy, are tested when the pair both fall for Katia, a Belorussian prostitute. Guest starring Patrick Baladi

programme.title: Stella Street
programme.desc: Mick's preaching starts to annoy the neighbours and Dirk Bogarde reveals some information to the police. Comedy, written and performed by John Sessions and Phil Cornwell

programme.title: Brakes (2016)
programme.desc: Comedy outlining the seemingly random and fragile nature of the connections that can lead to people becoming part of a couple, showing the final stages of a number of relationships then flashing back to how they got together. Starring Julian Barratt, Kerry Fox and Paul McGann

programme.title: Capricorn One (1977)
programme.desc: A mission to Mars is faked by sending a rocket up unmanned and filming a phoney landing in a TV studio. However, the empty spaceship burns up on its return to Earth, meaning the three astronauts who were supposed to be on board have to die to maintain the deception. As they flee for their lives from government agents, a journalist tries to uncover the truth. Thriller, starring Elliott Gould, James Brolin, OJ Simpson and Telly Savalas

programme.title: Stella Street
programme.desc: The lives, loves and laundry of the famous stars living in leafy Surbiton, as performed by impressionists John Sessions and Phil Cornwell

programme.title: The Queen's Cavalry
programme.desc: A trooper is punished during the Queen's Life Guards' rigorous 4pm daily inspection, a ritual that began after a poor turn-out for Queen Victoria. The armoured regiment heads for Farnham and manages to get a tank lost in the town's one-way system, while the trainee horsemen start a kitty during their training - paying £5 every time they fall off

programme.title: The Queen's Cavalry
programme.desc: The armoured divisions visit Canada for a mock battle, in which conditions are exactly as expected during a war - except lasers are used instead of live ammunition. Back in London, the trainee troopers don their breastplates as the ceremonial season begins, and prepare to guard the Queen for the first time

programme.title: Goodnight Sweetheart
programme.desc: Gary resolves to end his excursions back to the 1940s and spend more time with Yvonne - then realises he might have married Phoebe and returns to discover the truth. Starring Nicholas Lyndhurst, Michelle Holmes and Dervla Kirwan

programme.title: Goodnight Sweetheart
programme.desc: Gary returns to 1940 following an ultimatum from Yvonne, and Ron forges wartime money so his friend can make a killing on the stock exchange. Starring Nicholas Lyndhurst and Dervla Kirwan

programme.title: Europe at Sea (2017)
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the highest echelons of the European Union and their reaction to a changing world order

programme.title: Anna Lucasta (1958)
programme.desc: A woman driven out of her family home by her disapproving father falls into a life of prostitution. Eventually, she makes a fresh start when she falls in love with a wealthy man. However, her father is not about to let her forget her scandalous past. Drama, starring Eartha Kitt and Frederick O'Neal

programme.title: A Stitch in Time (1963)
programme.desc: A butcher's bumbling assistant causes no end of accidents at work, the latest of which has landed his boss in hospital. While visiting, he meets a little girl who has not spoken since her parents died, and resolves to put a smile on the orphan's face. Slapstick comedy, starring Norman Wisdom, Edward Chapman, Jerry Desmonde, Lucy Appleby and Jill Melford

programme.title: Taste of Marley
programme.desc: Rohan Marley, son of legendary musician Bob Marley, reconnects with his roots as he goes on a journey to explore the food and music of his native Jamaica

programme.title: Spotlight London
programme.desc: Interviews about arts and events showcasing London's vibrant culture scene

programme.title: Doodlebug Summer
programme.desc: How southerners reacted to the threat of Hitler's V1 flying bombs, which killed 452 people in a week at one point in the campaign. Notoriously inaccurate, the doodlebugs often fell short of their target and hit villages along the south coast from Kent to Dorset, prompting thousands in Chiselhurst to start living in caves

programme.title: London's Screen Archives Presents
programme.desc: A special compilation of historical short films themed around games from Film London's London Screen Archives.

programme.title: On the Up
programme.desc: Ruth refuses to go to Stephanie's school open day, so Tony takes his household staff instead. Mrs Wembley acquires an admirer - and a partner in the kitchen

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring Bankside and East Dulwich for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: Whatever Love Means ()
programme.desc: Drama chronicling the passionate relationship between Prince Charles and Camilla Parker Bowles prior to his marriage to Diana, Princess of Wales, in 1981. The film recreates the couple's first meeting at a polo match in 1971 and reveals how the confident 23-year-old Camilla Shand made a lasting impression on the prince. Although their friendship was fuelled by a shared sense of humour, Camilla's on-off affair with Andrew Parker Bowles meant there could be no future for them as man and wife. Camilla even suggested potential suitors as the pressure grew for the heir to the throne to find a suitable partner. Starring Laurence Fox, Olivia Poulet, Richard Johnson and Michelle Duncan

programme.title: The Hatton Garden Job (2017)
programme.desc: A ragtag group of career criminals plot an audacious, multi-million-pound raid on an underground facility in London. True-life crime drama, with Stephen Moyer, Larry Lamb and Matthew Goode

programme.title: The Escort (2015)
programme.desc: A sex-obsessed journalist whose career is falling apart has a chance encounter in a bar with a high-class prostitute. Seeing a chance to write the story that will make him a success, he persuades her to let him document her life, and a strange connection develops between the two lonely outsiders. Comedy drama, starring Michael Doneger, Lyndsy Fonseca and Bruce Campbell

programme.title: On the Up
programme.desc: Ruth refuses to go to Stephanie's school open day, so Tony takes his household staff instead. Mrs Wembley acquires an admirer - and a partner in the kitchen

programme.title: King Willy
programme.desc: A portrait of the famous old Hampstead pub William IV. Observe the action and hear from a number of regulars about their experiences and enjoyment of this establishment

programme.title: News Rewind
programme.desc: A digest of news and events from across London from the past few days.

programme.title: Talking Points
programme.desc: A chance to catch up on debates about the issues behind the headlines

programme.title: On the Up
programme.desc: Ruth refuses to go to Stephanie's school open day, so Tony takes his household staff instead. Mrs Wembley acquires an admirer - and a partner in the kitchen

programme.title: Doctor in the House (1954)
programme.desc: A medical student is taken under the wing of three roguish colleagues who lead him astray into a series of pranks and amorous escapades that succeed in infuriating the dictatorial chief surgeon. Comedy based on the novel by Richard Gordon, starring Dirk Bogarde, Kenneth More, James Robertson Justice and Donald Sinden

programme.title: Saturday Night Revue (1937)
programme.desc: A singer performs regularly in a small Soho club with her piano player boyfriend. She discovers that her father, who works for a recording company, will be coming to see them perform - but he has got the address of a far more exclusive establishment. The couple pull out all the stops to get themselves on the bill. Musical, starring Billy Milton and Sally Gray

programme.title: Far from the Madding Crowd (1967)
programme.desc: A beautiful woman arouses the ardour of three rival suitors in 19th-century rural Dorset and, having flirted and toyed with their affections, she chooses to marry a caddish, gambling soldier - a decision that leads to a sequence of harrowing events. John Schlesinger's adaptation of Thomas Hardy's classic novel, with Julie Christie, Alan Bates, Terence Stamp and Peter Finch

programme.title: Golden Years (2016)
programme.desc: A retired couple face a grim future after a financial crisis costs them both their pensions. Refusing to take the situation lying down, they resolve to take back what is rightfully theirs with a series of daring bank robberies. Comedy, starring Bernard Hill, Virginia McKenna, Simon Callow and Sue Johnston

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing lesser known areas of London for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: The Queen's Cavalry

programme.title: Spotlight London

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Peter Maneas embarks on a journey through some of the most spectacular and unique Greek islands, exploring the rich culture, history and food of Greece while meeting the locals and those who live there

programme.title: The Dales
programme.desc: Actor and comedian Adrian Edmondson returns to his birthplace of Yorkshire to document a summer in the life of the Dales, meeting the people who live there all year round. Sixteen-year-old Phillip Mellin talks about running his family's farm alongside his mother, following the death of his father last year, while vet Neil Roberts is called out to an emergency calving

programme.title: The Dales
programme.desc: Farmer Alex Wilkes takes her small herd of dairy cows to compete at the Great Yorkshire Show in Harrogate, and Adrian Edmondson meets Tom Orde-Powlett, who is the heir to the historic Bolton Castle in Wensleydale. Plus, 16-year-old Phillip Mellin tries to shear sheep for the first time

programme.title: The Comic Strip Presents
programme.desc: Four children with a taste for adventure investigate a strange mystery in between lashings of ginger beer during a trip to the country. Spoof of Enid Blyton's Famous Five books that first launched the comedy series, starring Peter Richardson, Adrian Edmondson, Jennifer Saunders and Dawn French

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing lesser known areas of London for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: Hoffman (1970)
programme.desc: A secretary is forced to accompany her creepy boss on a business trip, and gradually discovers another side to him. Comedy, starring Peter Sellers and Sinead Cusack

programme.title: Brakes (2016)
programme.desc: Comedy outlining the seemingly random and fragile nature of the connections that can lead to people becoming part of a couple, showing the final stages of a number of relationships then flashing back to how they got together. Starring Julian Barratt, Kerry Fox and Paul McGann

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Peter Maneas embarks on a journey through some of the most spectacular and unique Greek islands, exploring the rich culture, history and food of Greece while meeting the locals and those who live there

programme.title: Hardware
programme.desc: Comedy series from the pen of Men Behaving Badly creator Simon Nye, following the trials and triumphs faced by the staff of Hamway's Hardware, a traditional DIY store manned by best friends Mike and Kenny, manager Rex and student Steve. A customer's suicide attempt convinces Mike he must try to be nicer to the clientele and Julie from the local cafe sets Steve up on a blind date. Starring Martin Freeman, with Peter Serafinowicz, Ken Morley, Ryan Cartwright and Ella Kenion
